since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.82%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.50% · BTC -1.96% · Gold -2.02% · Nasdaq100 -1.48%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.82%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.82%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +6.34%, WDAY +5.17%, CRM +5.08%, SNOW +4.40%. Laggards: APP -11.72%, ARM -6.70%, MRVL -6.12%, OKLO -5.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.83% at $139.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
